products.name: Floral Printed Mae Gown
products.description: The Sachin & Babi Floral Printed Mae Gown showcases a rich floral satin crepe in a flattering V-neck silhouette with elbow-length flutter sleeves. Pair it with strappy heels and a sleek clutch for a polished look that transitions effortlessly across seasons.

products.name: Pearl Floral Tie Sleeve Gown
products.description: Elegant tie-sleeve gown perfect for spring weddings and galas. The pearl embellishments are delicate and the floral pattern adds a romantic touch to the silhouette.

products.name: Magnolia Midi Dress
products.description: The Magnolia Midi Dress by Sachin & Babi is a stunning blend of elegance and comfort, featuring a chic silhouette and vivid floral hues. Pair this luxe midi dress with strappy sandals for a relaxed daytime look, or elevate it with heels and a clutch for a more sophisticated evening ensemble.

products.name: Kaylee Sheer Top
products.description: The AFRM Mesh Kaylee Top is a sleek, long-sleeve mesh top featuring a flattering, fitted silhouette and a minimalist design. Layer this sheer piece over a simple black bra or camisole, pairing it with high-waisted leather pants and heels for a confident night-out look.

products.name: Kane Sequin Top
products.description: The One of Others Kane Sequin Top is a sleeveless, relaxed-fit top covered in a custom sequin fabrication, perfect for bringing glamour to your outfit. Tuck this dazzling piece into tailored black trousers and add simple heels for a refined, party-ready look.

reviews.title: Classy!
reviews.description: The sleeves on this dress are absolutely unique and I received compliments all night. The fabric feels very high-end and didn't wrinkle easily.

reviews.title: Nice fit
reviews.description: It was a bit long for my height, so I had to wear my highest heels. Other than the length, the fit was perfect and very flattering.

reviews.title: Wedding Guest Perfection
reviews.description: I wore this to a spring wedding and it was the perfect choice. The colors are even more vibrant in person than they appear in the photos.

reviews.title: Stunning
reviews.description: The pattern is gorgeous and the dress flows beautifully when you walk. It was very comfortable to wear for an 8-hour event.

reviews.title: Good quality
reviews.description: The fabric is a bit thinner than I expected, but it worked well for an outdoor summer party. The sizing was true to the chart provided.

reviews.title: Wow factor
reviews.description: Everyone kept asking where I got this dress. It arrived in perfect condition and smelled like it just came from the professional cleaners.

reviews.title: Lucky find
reviews.description: I wasn't sure about the cut, but it fit like a glove. I will definitely be renting this brand again for my next formal occasion.

reviews.title: Elegant
reviews.description: The neckline is very flattering and the waistline hits in just the right spot. It felt very posh and expensive to wear.

reviews.title: A bit tight
reviews.description: The bust area was a little bit more restrictive than other dresses in this size. If you are between sizes, I would recommend sizing up for comfort.

reviews.title: Soft fabric
reviews.description: The material feels like a dream against the skin. It has a beautiful subtle sheen that looks great in flash photography.

reviews.title: Well made
reviews.description: The stitching and construction of this gown are top-notch. You can tell it is a designer piece just by the way the lining is finished.

reviews.title: Bold style
reviews.description: The silhouette is very striking and modern. I loved the way the skirt moved on the dance floor.

reviews.title: Chic look
reviews.description: It’s a very stylish dress that stands out in a crowd. It arrived early and the return process was super simple.

reviews.title: Velvet Dream
reviews.description: The velvet is so plush and high quality. It was perfect for a winter gala and kept me quite warm.

reviews.title: Statuesque
reviews.description: I felt like a movie star in this column gown. The emerald color is deep and rich, looking better than the photos.

reviews.title: Sparkly Detail
reviews.description: The crystals on the neck are secure and very bright. I didn't even need to wear a necklace with this look.

reviews.title: Sharp Look
reviews.description: The cut is very architectural and clean. It provides a great shape while still being comfortable enough to sit in.

reviews.title: Perfect Length
reviews.description: With a 3-inch heel, this hit exactly where it needed to. The velvet has a nice stretch to it which helped with the fit.

reviews.title: Heavy Fabric
reviews.description: Just a heads up that this dress is quite heavy due to the velvet. It feels very expensive, but be prepared for the weight.

reviews.title: Gala Ready
reviews.description: I won best dressed at the charity event thanks to this gown! The delivery was prompt and the garment bag kept it safe.

reviews.title: Exquisite
reviews.description: The construction of the bodice is very supportive. I felt secure all night and didn't have to keep adjusting it.

reviews.title: Classy Emerald
reviews.description: The green color is a true jewel tone. It stood out beautifully against the standard black dresses at the party.

reviews.title: Sophisticated
reviews.description: This is a very mature and sophisticated look. It worked perfectly for my company's holiday ball.

reviews.title: Classic
reviews.description: A timeless design that will never go out of style. The velvet was soft and not itchy at all.

reviews.title: Fancy
reviews.description: I wore this to a gala on a ship and felt very appropriate. The dress stayed in place even with the ocean breeze.

reviews.title: Fantastic
reviews.description: The velvet has a beautiful nap and sheen. It looked very high-end under the ballroom lights.

reviews.title: Perfect
reviews.description: Absolutely no complaints about this rental. It was clean, fit well, and made me feel gorgeous.

reviews.title: Great
reviews.description: The slit in the back makes it easy to walk and dance. It’s a thoughtful design element that combines style and function.

reviews.title: Elite
reviews.description: This is top-tier Badgley Mischka. The quality is exactly what you expect from such a high-end designer.

reviews.title: Amazing
reviews.description: I got so many likes on my photos in this dress. It truly is a showstopper for any special occasion.

reviews.title: Lovely
reviews.description: The emerald green is very flattering on many skin tones. The dress has a nice weight that helps it hang perfectly.

reviews.title: Comfortable
reviews.description: Usually, column dresses are hard to move in, but this one was surprisingly flexible. I could actually breathe and eat dinner!

reviews.title: Dazzling
reviews.description: The crystals really catch the light when you turn. It was the perfect amount of sparkle for a winter formal.

reviews.title: Fairytale
reviews.description: I felt like a princess in this tulle gown. The layers are so airy and the fit was absolutely perfect.

reviews.title: Tons of Tulle
reviews.description: There is a lot of fabric here, so be prepared for a wide silhouette. It’s a stunning dress but takes up a bit of space!

reviews.title: Beautiful Bodice
reviews.description: The boning in the bodice is very well done and provided excellent support. I didn't even need a bra.

reviews.title: Dreamy Gown
reviews.description: The tulle is soft and high quality, not scratchy at all. It was a dream to wear to my sister's wedding.

reviews.title: Magical
reviews.description: This dress made the whole night feel magical. It’s definitely a head-turner and very photogenic.

reviews.title: Great Experience
reviews.description: The rental arrived on time and was in pristine condition. Returning it was a breeze with the prepaid label.

reviews.title: Elegant
reviews.description: The design is very elegant and fits true to size. I would highly recommend this for anyone wanting a ballgown look.

reviews.title: Showstopper
reviews.description: I've never felt more beautiful than I did in this dress. It truly is a showstopper for any major event.

reviews.title: Lovely Layers
reviews.description: The layers of tulle are expertly gathered to create a voluminous skirt. It moves beautifully when you walk or dance.

reviews.title: High Quality
reviews.description: You can really see the Marchesa quality in the details. Every seam is perfect and the tulle is very fine.

reviews.title: Wonderful
reviews.description: Everything about this rental was wonderful. I'll be using this service again for sure.

reviews.title: Fun Dress
reviews.description: It’s a very fun and youthful gown that’s perfect for a debutante ball or prom.

reviews.title: Amazing Fit
reviews.description: The fit was exactly as described in the sizing guide. It felt like it was tailored just for me.

reviews.title: Great Gown
reviews.description: The intricate work on the bodice is stunning. It’s a high-fashion piece that feels very special to wear.

reviews.title: So Pretty
reviews.description: I loved the airy feel of the tulle. It was the perfect choice for an evening wedding.

reviews.title: Stellar
reviews.description: Absolutely stellar gown. The color and the cut are both incredibly flattering.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.description: The overall quality is exceptional. It arrived in a sturdy box and was ready to wear immediately.

reviews.title: Chic
reviews.description: A very chic and modern take on the traditional ballgown.

reviews.title: Fantastic
reviews.description: The best rental I've had so far. The dress was gorgeous and the process was so easy.

reviews.title: Breathtaking
reviews.description: The dress was literally breathtaking. I couldn't have asked for a better look for my special night.

reviews.title: Superb
reviews.description: Everything from the fabric to the fit was superb. It made a huge impression on everyone at the party.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.description: The dress was in prime condition and looked brand new.

reviews.title: Loved It
reviews.description: It exceeded all of my expectations for a rental.

reviews.title: Very Good
reviews.description: A very nice dress that fit perfectly.

reviews.title: Dream Dress
reviews.description: It was everything I wanted.

reviews.title: Outstanding
reviews.description: It made me feel like the belle of the ball.

reviews.title: Ideal Choice
reviews.description: Comfortable, stylish, and fit like a dream.

reviews.title: Glowing
reviews.description: The tulle catches the light beautifully.

reviews.title: Perfectly Posh
reviews.description: It made the entire night feel extra special.

reviews.title: Elite Rental
reviews.description: The quality of the tulle and the construction are second to none.
